A sidebar add-on mirroring the Arc browser’s approach to tab organizing
Google-synced sidebar modeled after the ARC browser
Arc-style vertical tabs sidebar for Chrome. Organize tabs with drag & drop, groups, favorites, and a beautiful glassmorphism UI.

Arclight is the luxury upgrade for organized Chrome users. 

A stunning, forward-thinking sidebar helps you quickly see and organize tabs.  On-device AI auto-names your windows in realtime, and notices when a new tab should be in a different window.

Inspired by the Arc Browser, Arclight is the sidebar Chrome should have shipped with.

─────

WHAT YOU GET

 ◆ Light, Dark, and Auto themes — Gorgeous glassmorphism UI that matches your system
 ◆ Left or right sidebar positioning
 ◆ Smart window naming — Windows auto-name themselves based on your project
 ◆ Much more: Pinned tabs, favorite tabs, Chrome Tab Groups with color labels, rename and collapse tab lists, and more

─────

HOW IT WORKS

 ◆ Hover the edge of your screen to open the sidebar instantly
 ◆ Click any tab to switch to it, even across windows
 ◆ Drag tabs between windows or onto groups to organize
 ◆ Collapse windows and groups to focus on what matters
 ◆ Custom keyboard shortcut — Set your own hotkey to toggle the sidebar
 ◆ New in 1.1: Open a link from any external app — Arclight suggests the right window based on your workflow

─────

THOUGHTFUL DESIGN

 ◆ Your most recent window always rises to the top — no hunting for where you just were
 ◆ Tab titles are cleaned up automatically
 ◆ The active tab indicator only shows in the focused window
 ◆ Single-tab windows group at the bottom

─────

FREE DURING EARLY ACCESS

 ◆ Favorites — One-click bookmarks pinned to the top of your sidebar
 ◆ Pinned Tabs — Tabs that persist across browser restarts
 ◆ AI Window Names — On-device AI (Gemini Nano) generates smart window names based on your open tabs
 ◆ New in 1.1: Smart Tab Routing — When you open a link from an external app, on-device AI figures out which window it belongs in and offers to move it there with a single click

─────

PRIVACY FIRST

Arclight runs entirely locally. No data collected, no accounts, no cloud calls. The optional AI naming feature uses Chrome's built-in Gemini Nano model — everything stays on your device. Zero tracking, zero analytics, zero telemetry.
Results in 5 seconds, enhanced search capabilities on a dozen sites with quick select search (level up your super-search skills)

*** 📖 How to Use ***
Direct Search

Highlight the web, react to text, and save ideas as local cards with notes, images, sources, and AI titles.

Wheel Highlighter is a local-first web highlighter for reading, research, studying, and saving what matters on the web.

Select text on any webpage, mark it with a warm color palette, react with Heart, Like, or Dislike, and turn what you capture into organized cards. Cards can hold editable titles, notes, source links, image pockets, and copy controls. Everything stays in your browser storage. No account, no cloud sync, no ads, and no tracking.

Main features:

Highlight selected text with a seven-color palette.
Save highlights automatically on the page.
Turn highlights into editable cards.
React to text with Heart, Like, or Dislike.
Create themed reaction cards in React mode.
Use Bullets or Numbers mode to gather multiple passages into one card.
Organize cards into stacks for different projects, topics, or research trails.
Drag images, links, or text onto cards as attachments and sources.
Generate short card titles locally with on-device AI.
Copy an entire stack as rich text for notes apps like Notion, Obsidian, Google Docs, Apple Notes, and more.
Browse saved pages and return to what you marked.
Highlight Mode:
Use Highlight mode when you want classic web highlighting. Select text, choose a color, and save it as a card with an editable title, note area, and copy controls.

React Mode:
Use React mode when you want to mark your response to something you read. Heart, Like, and Dislike create their own visual marks on the page and their own themed cards in the panel.

Bullets and Numbers:
Switch to Bullets or Numbers mode when you want to collect several selections into one organized card. Select multiple passages, then commit them together.

Stacks:
Stacks let you keep different research trails separate. A stack can hold cards from different pages, so one topic can stay together across articles, forums, blogs, and references.

Card Attachments:
Drop an image, link, or text onto a card. Images appear as a small pocket preview, and links are saved as sources.

Copy Stack:
Copy a whole stack as rich text, including group headings, card titles, highlighted text, notes, source links, image previews, and reaction emojis. Paste it into your favorite note app to keep researching, writing, or studying.

Privacy:
Wheel Highlighter is local-first. It does not require an account, does not use a developer-run backend, and does not sell or track your data. Your highlights, cards, notes, attachments, and settings live in your browser storage.

Wheel Highlighter is free to use. Optional support is available through Buy Me a Coffee.
Mira — an elegant English to Chinese translator and tab overview side panel.

Mira is an elegant side panel for instant English-to-Chinese translation and intelligent tab management. Translate any text on the web with a clean, distraction-free experience, while keeping your open tabs organized and accessible in one streamlined workspace.

Designed for bilingual users, students, researchers, and professionals, Mira combines fast translation with a modern browser productivity workflow. Instead of switching between multiple tools, you can translate content, review webpages, and manage tabs directly from Chrome’s side panel.

Key Features:
• Instant English → Chinese translation with natural, readable output
• Elegant side panel interface built for focus and speed
• Quickly view, search, and navigate open tabs
• Smooth workflow for reading articles, documentation, research, and AI content
• Lightweight experience that stays out of your way
• Designed with a clean, modern aesthetic inspired by native productivity apps

Why Mira:
Most translation extensions feel cluttered, intrusive, or outdated. Mira is designed differently — minimal, fast, and thoughtfully crafted for people who spend hours reading and working online. Whether you are browsing technical documentation, reading international news, studying, or working across languages, Mira helps reduce friction and keep your workflow organized.

Perfect For:
• Developers and technical readers
• Students and researchers
• AI and productivity enthusiasts
• Anyone who keeps too many tabs open

Mira continues to evolve with ongoing improvements to translation quality, usability, and browser workflow tools.

A sleek bookmark manager in your browser sidebar.

URLflows Workspace — your bookmarks, organized.

Tired of a cluttered tab bar and a bookmarks bar you outgrew years ago? URLflows Workspace puts the links you actually use into a clean side panel that's always one click away — no digging through nested folders, no tabs lost in a sea of forty others.

WHAT IT IS

A bookmark manager that lives in your browser's side panel (or as a floating window, your choice). Built for people who switch contexts all day — product folks, engineers, designers, students, writers, anyone who lives in the browser.

WHAT IT DOES

Keep your daily links in one place, grouped into sections you control. Drag a tab into a section to bookmark it. Click any link to open it the way you want — new tab, popup, or app window with a custom size. Wipe your tab clutter in seconds by replacing every open tab with a saved set of links. And the more you use it, the smarter it gets — your most-clicked links surface automatically at the top.

WHY INSTALL IT

The native Chrome bookmarks system is powerful but slow to navigate. The bookmarks bar runs out of room fast. Pinned tabs lock things in place but eat up tab space. A separate browser profile is overkill when all you want is "my work links, right here, easy to reach."

URLflows fills that gap. Focused, fast, out of the way when you don't need it.

KEY FEATURES

Sections and dividers
Group related links into sections you can rename and reorder. Add labelled dividers inside a section to break up sub-groups.

Save Tabs
Capture every open tab in your current window as a brand-new section, stamped with the date and time. Great for "save this research before I close it" moments.

Refocus Tabs
Define sets of essential links — like "Morning Standup", "Deep Work", or "On-Call Triage" — and replace your current tab clutter with that set in one click.

Top Bookmarks
Your most-clicked links rise automatically to a section at the top. No setup required.

Drag and drop everything
Reorder links and sections by dragging. Drop a tab from your browser into a section to bookmark it. Drop a URL from anywhere — Slack, Notion, an email — and it lands as a new bookmark.

Live search
Filter your entire library as you type. Matches by title or URL.

20+ themes
Tokyo Night, Dracula, Solarized, Nord, Catppuccin, Synthwave, Matrix, Cyberpunk, Sepia, Mint, Forest, and more. Switch any time without leaving the sidebar.

Floating pop-out window
Prefer a window to a side panel? Pop out a floating window that mirrors your sidebar exactly.

Temp Notes
A scratchpad pinned to the sidebar for quick jots that don't deserve a full notes app. Resize it, hide it, move it to the top — your call.

Push to Mobile
One click copies your sections into Chrome's bookmark folder so they show up on your phone via Chrome Sync.

Backup and restore
Download a single file with everything — bookmarks, sections, settings. Restore on any device, after a clean install, or to share your setup with someone else.

Multi-profile friendly
Tag each backup file with a label like "work" or "personal" so files from different setups don't get confused.

Density and font controls
Compact, normal, or comfortable spacing. Pick a font that fits your taste.

Per-link open behaviour
Tell each bookmark how to open — new tab, specific tab position, popup, or app window with custom width and height. Set it once and forget it.

Loaded with example data
First time? Hit "Load Example Data" and start with a curated set of 100+ links across AI tools, product management, engineering management, React/Next.js, Ruby on Rails, daily essentials, and tech news. Tweak from there.

PRIVACY

Your bookmarks, sections, themes, and notes live entirely on your own device. Nothing is uploaded, sold, or shared. Anonymous usage stats are off by default — flip them on in Settings only if you want to help us learn which features matter most. No accounts, no logins, no tracking.

Free. Open. No subscription. No upsells.

Get back to a tidy browser. Install URLflows Workspace.

A beautiful, fast, and privacy-first New Tab dashboard to organize and monitor your bookmark folders.

martabs is a lightweight, privacy-first browser extension that replaces your default New Tab page with a customizable bookmark dashboard. Designed for users with large bookmark collections, it allows you to search, organize, tag, and style your workspace completely offline—without telemetry or external connections.

🎨 DESIGN & CUSTOMIZATION
• Premium Glassmorphic UI: Frosted glass panels that automatically adjust to your wallpaper.
• Custom Wallpapers: Upload up to 3 local images (IndexedDB secure storage) with random rotation, brightness, and surface opacity controls.
• Animated Gradients: Pick from 6 curated presets or design your own linear/radial gradients with an interactive color editor and a GPU-accelerated liquid Aurora floating effect.
• Dark/Light Theme: Force light, dark, or system default schemes on a per-wallpaper basis.

📂 ORGANIZATION & LAYOUT
• Hierarchical Folder Tree: Navigate your monitored bookmarks structure via a sleek sidebar.
• 5 Visual Folder Modes: Choose the perfect layout per folder—List, Compact, Icons, Large Icons, or Quicklinks.
• Flexible Sorting: Sort bookmark cards globally or per-folder by original order, manual drag-and-drop, title, date added, domain name, or broken-first.
• Virtual Pinned Folder: Highlight your favorite bookmarks inside their folders and pin them to a top-level virtual directory for instant access.
• Frequent Sites: Optional virtual folder displaying your most visited sites using the browser's native Top Sites API.

🔍 POWERFUL TOOLS
• Accent-Insensitive Instant Search: Instantly filter bookmark title, URL, domain path, folders, and tags as you type.
• Smart Tagging: Create manual tags or let martabs generate automatic tags based on folder trees and URL structures.
• Link Health Checker: Validate your bookmarks for broken URLs, redirects, and offline pages directly from your dashboard.
• Local Usage Statistics: Visually track your clicks with a private, offline bar chart.
• Offline Captures: Optionally trigger local website screenshots when opening bookmarks to create offline visual previews.

🔒 PRIVACY & INFRASTRUCTURE
• 100% Offline: martabs never calls third-party preview engines, icon services, or data tracking servers. Everything is stored locally.
• Dynamic Permissions: Optional API permissions (like topSites or host-permissions for health checks) are requested only when enabling features and are immediately revoked when disabled.
• Portability: Export and import your entire configuration (including tags, slot themes, and local stats) with profile ID remapping.
• 11 Languages Supported: English, Spanish, Portuguese, German, French, Italian, Korean, Russian, Arabic, Simplified Chinese, and Japanese.

https://github.com/UnkSGit/martabs

PageMine — Hide Distractions on Web Pages
Hide distracting elements on any webpage. Your layout, your rules.

PageMine lets you hide any element on a website with a single click.

🧩 HOW TO USE:
1. Click the PageMine icon in your toolbar
2. Click "Start Selecting"
3. Hover over any element to highlight it, then click to hide it
4. Done - that element is gone

KEY FEATURES:
- Point-and-click element removal - instantly hide anything
- Auto-saved preferences - your choices are remembered per site
- Easy undo - change your mind anytime, visible in the popup list
- One-tap site reset - restore everything with a single click
- 100% private and offline - all data stored locally

POPULAR USE CASES:
- Video platforms - hide sidebar, autoplay previews, "Up next" panels
- News & media - remove related stories, comment sections
- Shopping sites - clear away "frequently bought together" boxes, popups
- Social platforms - hide trending topics, suggested follows
- Work tools - declutter by hiding unused widgets

PERMISSIONS:
PageMine only requests necessary permissions:
- Scripting - to inject the hiding logic
- Storage - to save your preferences locally
- Active Tab - to identify which page you're viewing
- Tabs - to sync the popup with your active tab

No tracking. No servers. Everything stays on your device.

Local-first browsing analytics + one-click tab organizer for Chrome. Replace your new tab, see where your hours actually go.

See where your time actually goes online.

SiteLogs is a Chrome extension that quietly records how long you spend
on each website — locally, on your machine. Replaces your new tab with
a personal dashboard, organizes 47 stale tabs in one click, and never
sends a byte anywhere.

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
✦ What it does
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

⏱ Honest time tracking — counts active focus minutes, pauses on idle.
   Not "tab open duration". Per-URL, per-domain, per-category.

🏠 Custom new tab dashboard — every new tab opens your personal stats,
   pinned shortcuts, hot sites, and the 24×7 heatmap. No Google search
   bar, no sponsored links.

📌 Pin frequently-used sites — one-click access from the new tab.

🗂 One-click tab cleanup — close duplicate URLs, group remaining tabs
   by domain into Chrome's native colored tab groups. Save the current
   window as a named Session, restore it later.

📈 Period-over-period analysis — today vs your average Tuesday, this
   week vs last week, new domains vs lapsed.

🎯 Focus blocks (≥10 min continuous reading) auto-detected. Daily
   focus budgets per category with progress bars.

🏷 Tags + custom rules — 200+ entry built-in dictionary maps domains
   to 13 categories; override with your own domain or regex rules.

🌏 EN / 中文 — fully bilingual, switch in Settings.

✦ Privacy by design
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

100% local-first. Your browsing data lives in your browser's IndexedDB
on this device — never uploaded, never indexed by anyone else. We have
no server. We can't see what you visit, even subpoenaed.

The only outbound calls are Google Fonts CSS (will self-host) and
license-key activation when you pay.

No telemetry. No analytics. No external tracking. No login required.

A locally stored dashboard for organizing links as cards on Chrome new tabs.

LED-Lit District is a local-first dashboard extension for organizing your Chrome new tab workspace.

It lets you save frequently used pages as link cards, organize them into groups, and customize the dashboard with themes, backgrounds, card appearance settings, and layout options.

Main features:

◆ Link cards
Save frequently used web pages as cards.
Each card can include a title, URL, and card image.

◆ Group organization
Organize cards into groups.
You can arrange links by purpose, project, category, hobby, or any structure that fits your workflow.

◆ Profile switching
Create multiple profiles and switch between different dashboard setups depending on your purpose.
You can separate cards and groups for work, hobbies, research, or other use cases.

◆ Dashboard search
Search across your registered cards and groups.
This makes it easier to find links even when your dashboard grows.

◆ Themes and appearance customization
Customize the dashboard with theme presets, backgrounds, blur settings, card appearance options, and layout settings.
You can keep the dashboard simple or create a more atmospheric workspace.

◆ User-controlled screenshot support
LED-Lit District can use the currently active page as a screenshot source only when you explicitly perform a related action.
It does not automatically browse registered websites in the background, and it does not automatically collect screenshots from sites.

◆ Incognito mode support
When the user allows LED-Lit District to run in incognito mode from Chrome’s extension settings, the extension can also be used in incognito windows.
It is configured to operate in a separate incognito context from normal browsing windows.

◆ JSON import and export
Export and import dashboard data as JSON.
Limited import support is also available for some existing dashboard-style JSON formats, focusing on group names, card titles, and URLs.
Compatibility with all JSON files or future format changes is not guaranteed.

◆ Optional new tab dashboard behavior
You can choose whether Chrome’s new tab page should open the LED-Lit District dashboard.
This behavior is controlled by user settings and is not forced automatically.

Privacy:

LED-Lit District does not require an account.
It does not provide cloud synchronization.
It does not send dashboard data or personal information to an external server operated by the extension developer.

Settings, cards, groups, themes, and locally saved images are stored in the browser using Chrome storage mechanisms such as chrome.storage.local and IndexedDB.

This extension is intended for users who want a customizable, locally stored dashboard for managing their own links.

AI tab manager: smart grouping, tab snooze, spaces, focus mode, AI search & summarize, dark mode.

SmartTab — The smartest way to manage your browser tabs.

  Tired of tab chaos? SmartTab uses AI to help you organize, find, and manage your tabs effortlessly.

  🗂 TAB MANAGEMENT
  • Smart Group — Auto-organize tabs by category (Social, Video, Dev, Shopping...)
  • Group by Site — Group tabs from the same website
  • Auto-Group — Automatically groups new tabs as you browse
  • Close Duplicates — Find and close duplicate tabs instantly
  • Bulk Actions — Select multiple tabs to close, snooze, or save at once
  • Tab Age Indicator — See how long each tab has been open

  🔍 SEARCH & FIND
  • Instant Search — Find any tab across all windows
  • Quick Commands — Type "/" for power-user commands
  • Keyboard Navigation — Arrow keys + Enter to switch tabs fast

  🤖 AI FEATURES (Pro)
  • AI Search — Ask questions about your open tabs
  • AI Summarize — Get quick summaries of any page
  • AI Tab Rename — Clean up messy tab titles automatically

  📁 SPACES & COLLECTIONS
  • Create custom Spaces to organize tabs by project
  • Save & restore tab collections with one click
  • Schedule Spaces to open automatically on specific days

  ⏰ TAB SNOOZE
  • Snooze tabs for later — 30 min, 1 hour, tomorrow, or pick a custom time
  • Tabs reopen automatically when the time comes

  📖 READING LIST
  • Save tabs to read later
  • Track read/unread status

  🎯 FOCUS MODE
  • Hide all tabs except your current task
  • Eliminate distractions, boost productivity

  💾 SESSIONS
  • Save your current tabs as a session
  • Restore sessions anytime
  • Auto-save sessions daily (Pro)

  📊 STATS & INSIGHTS
  • See your tab count, top sites, duplicates
  • Memory usage estimates with one-click suspend
  • Time per site tracking (Pro)

  🔊 AUDIO DETECTION
  • See which tabs are playing sound
  • Mute/unmute tabs directly from the popup

  🖥 FULL DASHBOARD
  • Drag & drop tab management in a full-page view
  • Visual overview of all your tabs as cards

  ⌨️ KEYBOARD SHORTCUTS
  • Ctrl+Shift+S — Open SmartTab
  • Ctrl+Shift+G — Smart Group
  • Ctrl+Shift+B — Open Dashboard
  • Fully customizable in Chrome settings

  🌙 DARK MODE
  • Easy on the eyes, beautiful in both light and dark

  💾 EXPORT & IMPORT
  • Backup all your data as JSON
  • Restore on any device

  🔒 PRIVACY
  • Your data stays local — we never collect or sell your information
  • AI features use secure, encrypted connections
  • No tracking, no analytics, no ads

  SmartTab is free with optional Pro upgrade for AI-powered features.
A premium, glassmorphic tab manager to organize, search, and group your tabs with ease.

Smart Tab Manager is a browser extension that helps users organize and manage their browser tabs automatically. It reduces clutter, improves productivity, and makes browsing faster by intelligently grouping, cleaning, and optimizing open tabs.

Many users open dozens of tabs while working, studying, or browsing the internet. Managing these tabs manually can be difficult and time-consuming. Smart Tab Manager solves this problem by automatically organizing tabs and suggesting ways to keep the browser clean and efficient.
The ultimate command palette for Chrome. Search tabs, bookmarks, and history instantly.

SpotLine is a minimalist productivity tool designed to eliminate the friction of managing a high volume of open tabs. Instead of visually scanning your tab bar or relying on sequential shortcuts, SpotLine lets you jump directly to any open resource or bookmark by simply typing a few characters.

Core Features:

1. High-Performance Fuzzy Search
- Optimized algorithm delivers results in under 30ms, even with hundreds of entries.
- Gracefully handles typos and intelligently prioritizes exact matches and recent activity.

2. Keyboard-Centric Workflow
- Activate the palette via a customizable shortcut (default: Ctrl+Q).
- Select, switch, and close tabs exclusively via the keyboard, so you never have to leave the home row.

3. Customizable Interface
- Includes built-in themes (Dark, Light, Dracula, Nord, Catppuccin).
- Visual editor to adapt interface colors to your workspace requirements.

4. Privacy and Security
- Operates entirely offline: no data ever leaves your browser.
- No external API calls, telemetry, or tracking.
- All processing happens locally within your browser's sandbox.

5. Open Source
- Transparent project with source code available on the GitHub repository: haksolot/SpotLine.

---

Why Choose SpotLine?
- Save time: Access your tabs in an instant.
- Privacy-first: No data collection.
- Flexible: Customize the tool to fit your needs.
全文検索・自動タグ付け・ドメイン別表示で、もっと便利な閲覧履歴体験を

Histraは、Chromeの履歴ページをもっと使いやすくする拡張機能です。

  ■ 全文検索
  URLやタイトルだけでなく、ページ本文の内容でも検索できます。日本語にも対応。「あのページ、なんて名前だっけ？」をすぐに解決します。

  ■ 自動タグ付け
  訪問したサイトをDev・SNS・動画・ショッピングなどのカテゴリに自動分類。履歴をタグでフィルタリングして、目的のページをすばやく見つけられます。

  ■ カスタムタグ
  自分だけのタグを作成して履歴を自由に整理。仕事用・趣味・あとで読むなど、好きな分類で管理できます。

  ■ タイムライン表示
  日付ごとにグループ化された見やすい時系列ビュー。いつ何を見たか、一目で把握できます。

  ■ ドメイン別表示
  サイトごとに訪問回数と最終訪問日を集計。よく使うサイトの利用状況がわかります。

  ■ ダークモード対応
  システム設定に連動して、ライト／ダークを自動切り替え。

  ■ プライバシー重視
  データはすべてブラウザ内（IndexedDB）に保存。外部サーバーへの送信は一切ありません。

Deterministic password manager. No vault, no sync — just an algorithm.

Keyfount is a password manager that stores nothing.

Instead of keeping a vault of your passwords, Keyfount recomputes each one on the spot from three things:
• your master password (the only thing you remember)
• the website you're signing in to
• your email or username on that site

The same three inputs always produce the same password — so there's no vault to leak, no sync server to trust, and no cloud backup to breach. The trade-off is deliberate: forget your master password and your passwords are gone.

WHY KEYFOUNT
• No vault, no sync, no cloud — there is nothing stored to steal.
• No network access, ever. The extension contains zero lines of network code.
• No accounts, no tracking, no telemetry, no third-party SDKs.
• Open source (MIT) and reproducible from the public repository.

FEATURES
• Deterministic generation with Argon2id (64 MiB, 3 iterations) — memory-hard against GPU and ASIC brute-force.
• Two output modes: random characters (configurable length and character sets), or a memorable passphrase from the EFF Large Wordlist (~78 bits of entropy at six words).
• Per-site settings to satisfy awkward password rules without breaking the algorithm.
• Counter-based rotation — if a password leaks, bump the counter for a fresh one without changing your master.
• Visual fingerprint — a three-emoji code unique to your master password, shown on unlock, so a typo is obvious before you submit.
• Optional PIN unlock (4–6 digits) for convenience, with a clear warning about the trade-off.
• Inline badge on password fields — one click to fill or copy.

HOW IT'S DIFFERENT
A traditional manager encrypts and stores a vault you must protect and keep in sync. Keyfount derives passwords from a short algorithm, so the only secret is the one in your head. Less to store, less to sync, less to leak.

PRIVACY
Keyfount collects no data of any kind. Your master password is processed locally and never leaves your device.
Source code: https://github.com/Keyfount/extension
